name: revenue
label: Revenue
caveats: Order-grain booked revenue: SUM(orders.total_amount) over orders not cancelled. Cancelled orders never delivered, so they are excluded by default. Refunded orders WERE fulfilled then reversed — include them in gross booked revenue; exclude them only when net-of-returns is explicitly requested.
wrong_usage_examples: SUM(order_items.line_total) — line-item grain; on this data it diverges ~4.3x from order totals (a different basis, not the same revenue). Use orders.total_amount for order/total revenue; reserve line_total for product/category-grain revenue where order totals cannot be apportioned.
SUM(total_amount) joined to order_items without de-duplicating to one row per order — the join fans out and multiplies revenue by the line count.

name: aov
label: Average Order Value
caveats: AVG(orders.total_amount) at order grain. NEVER AVG(order_items.line_total) — that is per-line, not per-order, and undercounts AOV by the average lines-per-order. Cancelled orders excluded by default; on this data excluding them barely moves AOV (cancelled orders are average-sized).
wrong_usage_examples: AVG(line_total) sold as AOV — that is average LINE value, not average ORDER value (the $467-vs-$1108 grain confusion).
